/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/storage/StorageTier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/storage/StorageManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/db/ObjectMetadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/core/ObjectManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/core/AccessManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/core/AuditLogger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/db/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/migration/MigrationEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/classifier/TieringPolicy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/migration/AutoTieringEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/classification/ClassificationEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/core/PolicyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/core/BackgroundTieringDaemon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/utils/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/utils/TierUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/monitoring/MonitoringEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autotierx.dir/src/api/ApiServer.cpp.o -o autotierx  -lsqlite3
